name: MERITT Intent Reference
description: MERITT's original intent classification taxonomy for enterprise AI authority. Covers 14 operational domains with sub-categories for precise intent routing, risk assessment, and compliance mapping.

domains.name: Software Development
domains.description: Build, test, deploy, release, and govern code across the software development lifecycle.

categories.name: Code Management
categories.description: Source control operations including branching, merging, and repository administration.

categories.name: Build & CI
categories.description: Continuous integration pipelines, build orchestration, and artifact generation.

categories.name: Testing & QA
categories.description: Automated testing, test plan management, quality gates, and regression analysis.

categories.name: Deployment & Release
categories.description: Release management, deployment orchestration, rollback procedures, and environment promotion.

categories.name: Change Control
categories.description: Change advisory processes, impact assessment, deployment policies, and release standards.

categories.name: Architecture & Design
categories.description: Architecture validation, component integration, design review, and technical debt management.

categories.name: Package & Dependency
categories.description: Dependency management, package bundling, vulnerability scanning, and license compliance.

domains.name: Security Operations
domains.description: Detect, respond to, and remediate security threats across the enterprise.

categories.name: Threat Detection
categories.description: Intrusion detection, anomaly monitoring, threat intelligence, and alert triage.

categories.name: Incident Response
categories.description: Security breach response, containment, forensic analysis, and recovery procedures.

categories.name: Vulnerability Management
categories.description: Vulnerability scanning, patch management, penetration testing, and remediation tracking.

categories.name: Identity & Access
categories.description: Identity lifecycle, access provisioning, MFA implementation, and privilege management.

categories.name: Credential Management
categories.description: Secret rotation, certificate management, API key lifecycle, and credential vaulting.

categories.name: Security Policy
categories.description: Security policy creation, enforcement, compliance auditing, and framework alignment.

categories.name: Data Protection
categories.description: Data classification, encryption management, DLP controls, and privacy enforcement.

domains.name: Infrastructure
domains.description: Provision, scale, and maintain compute, storage, and network systems.

categories.name: Provisioning
categories.description: Infrastructure provisioning, environment setup, and resource allocation.

categories.name: Scaling & Capacity
categories.description: Auto-scaling, capacity planning, load balancing, and performance optimization.

categories.name: Monitoring & Observability
categories.description: System monitoring, alerting, APM, log aggregation, and SLO management.

categories.name: Disaster Recovery
categories.description: Backup management, failover procedures, recovery testing, and continuity planning.

categories.name: Configuration Management
categories.description: Infrastructure-as-code, configuration drift detection, and state management.

categories.name: Maintenance
categories.description: Scheduled maintenance, patching, firmware updates, and lifecycle management.

categories.name: Network Operations
categories.description: Network provisioning, DNS management, firewall rules, and connectivity troubleshooting.

domains.name: Cloud Operations
domains.description: SaaS management, platform operations, multi-cloud governance, and service catalog administration.

categories.name: SaaS Management
categories.description: SaaS application lifecycle, license optimization, and usage tracking.

categories.name: Platform Operations
categories.description: Platform health, service mesh management, and runtime governance.

categories.name: Service Catalog
categories.description: Service catalog maintenance, request fulfillment, and service portfolio management.

categories.name: SLA Management
categories.description: SLA definition, monitoring, reporting, and escalation procedures.

categories.name: Resource Optimization
categories.description: Cloud cost optimization, rightsizing, reserved instance management, and waste elimination.

categories.name: Multi-Cloud Governance
categories.description: Cross-cloud policy enforcement, workload placement, and vendor management.

domains.name: Financial Operations
domains.description: Budgets, payments, procurement, treasury, and financial reporting.

categories.name: Accounts Payable
categories.description: Invoice processing, payment approval, vendor payments, and disbursement tracking.

categories.name: Accounts Receivable
categories.description: Revenue posting, collections management, credit assessment, and aging analysis.

categories.name: Billing & Invoicing
categories.description: Invoice generation, billing reconciliation, subscription billing, and metering.

categories.name: Payroll
categories.description: Payroll processing, tax withholding, direct deposit management, and pay statement generation.

categories.name: Treasury & Cash
categories.description: Cash management, bank reconciliation, wire transfers, and liquidity forecasting.

categories.name: Budgeting & Planning
categories.description: Budget creation, variance analysis, forecasting, and financial planning.

categories.name: Procurement
categories.description: Purchase requisitions, purchase orders, vendor selection, and spend management.

categories.name: Tax & Compliance
categories.description: Tax calculation, regulatory filing, audit preparation, and compliance reporting.

domains.name: Supply Chain
domains.description: Sourcing, logistics, vendor management, and inventory optimization.

categories.name: Procurement Lifecycle
categories.description: Requisition processing, purchase order management, and procurement approvals.

categories.name: Vendor Management
categories.description: Vendor onboarding, performance evaluation, contract negotiation, and relationship management.

categories.name: Logistics & Fulfillment
categories.description: Shipment tracking, warehouse management, delivery scheduling, and returns processing.

categories.name: Inventory Management
categories.description: Stock tracking, reorder management, demand forecasting, and warehouse optimization.

categories.name: Quality Assurance
categories.description: Incoming inspection, supplier quality, non-conformance tracking, and quality metrics.

domains.name: People Operations
domains.description: Hiring, onboarding, workforce management, and employee lifecycle administration.

categories.name: Recruiting
categories.description: Job requisitions, candidate screening, interview coordination, and offer management.

categories.name: Onboarding & Offboarding
categories.description: Employee onboarding workflows, access provisioning, exit procedures, and knowledge transfer.

categories.name: Compensation & Benefits
categories.description: Compensation management, benefits administration, equity grants, and total rewards.

categories.name: Time & Attendance
categories.description: Time tracking, leave management, scheduling, and overtime approval.

categories.name: Performance Management
categories.description: Performance reviews, goal setting, feedback collection, and development planning.

categories.name: Learning & Development
categories.description: Training program management, certification tracking, and skill development.

domains.name: Revenue Operations
domains.description: Pipeline management, deal execution, renewals, and revenue intelligence.

categories.name: Pipeline Management
categories.description: Lead qualification, opportunity tracking, pipeline forecasting, and deal progression.

categories.name: Deal Execution
categories.description: Proposal generation, pricing execution, contract negotiation, and order processing.

categories.name: Renewals & Expansion
categories.description: Renewal management, upsell identification, expansion revenue, and churn prevention.

categories.name: Sales Analytics
categories.description: Revenue forecasting, win/loss analysis, territory planning, and performance metrics.

categories.name: Campaign Operations
categories.description: Campaign execution, lead scoring, attribution tracking, and marketing automation.

domains.name: Customer Experience
domains.description: Support, success, satisfaction measurement, and customer lifecycle management.

categories.name: Support Operations
categories.description: Ticket management, escalation handling, knowledge base maintenance, and SLA tracking.

categories.name: Customer Success
categories.description: Health scoring, onboarding assistance, adoption tracking, and retention programs.

categories.name: Complaint Management
categories.description: Complaint intake, resolution tracking, root cause analysis, and service recovery.

categories.name: Returns & Warranty
categories.description: Returns authorization, warranty claim processing, and product recall management.

categories.name: Satisfaction Measurement
categories.description: NPS surveys, CSAT tracking, feedback analysis, and experience improvement.

domains.name: Enterprise Operations
domains.description: Strategy, planning, governance, and cross-functional operational management.

categories.name: Project Management
categories.description: Project execution, resource allocation, milestone tracking, and stakeholder reporting.

categories.name: Quality Management
categories.description: Quality testing, process improvement, Six Sigma initiatives, and defect tracking.

categories.name: Change Management
categories.description: Organizational change programs, communication planning, and adoption measurement.

categories.name: Knowledge Management
categories.description: Content publishing, documentation governance, and institutional knowledge capture.

categories.name: Analytics & Reporting
categories.description: Business intelligence, operational dashboards, performance benchmarking, and data analysis.

categories.name: Strategic Planning
categories.description: Portfolio governance, strategic initiatives, OKR management, and investment planning.

domains.name: Service Delivery
domains.description: Fulfillment, SLA adherence, quality assurance, and service operations management.

categories.name: Resource Planning
categories.description: Workforce planning, capacity allocation, and resource scheduling for service delivery.

categories.name: Service Execution
categories.description: Service fulfillment, work order management, and delivery milestone tracking.

categories.name: Completion Management
categories.description: Service closure, acceptance verification, and post-delivery review.

categories.name: SLA Compliance
categories.description: SLA monitoring, performance reporting, penalty management, and continuous improvement.

domains.name: Risk Management
domains.description: Assessment, mitigation, compliance, and enterprise risk governance.

categories.name: Risk Assessment
categories.description: Risk identification, probability analysis, impact scoring, and risk register management.

categories.name: Risk Mitigation
categories.description: Control implementation, risk treatment plans, and residual risk monitoring.

categories.name: Compliance Management
categories.description: Regulatory compliance tracking, audit management, control testing, and attestation.

categories.name: Business Continuity
categories.description: Continuity planning, scenario testing, crisis management, and recovery coordination.

categories.name: Contract & Legal
categories.description: Contract lifecycle management, IP protection, legal hold, and regulatory filing.

domains.name: Product Operations
domains.description: Roadmap management, product discovery, launch coordination, and product lifecycle governance.

categories.name: Product Lifecycle
categories.description: Product development stages, lifecycle tracking, and end-of-life management.

categories.name: Master Data Management
categories.description: Product data governance, catalog management, and data quality assurance.

categories.name: Regulatory Submissions
categories.description: Product regulatory filings, certification tracking, and compliance documentation.

categories.name: Discovery & Research
categories.description: Market research, user research, prototype management, and experiment tracking.

domains.name: Asset Management
domains.description: Inventory tracking, lifecycle management, maintenance scheduling, and asset disposal.

categories.name: Maintenance Scheduling
categories.description: Preventive maintenance planning, work order generation, and maintenance windows.

categories.name: Maintenance Execution
categories.description: Maintenance task completion, parts management, and technician coordination.

categories.name: Decommissioning
categories.description: Asset retirement, secure disposal, data wiping, and environmental compliance.

categories.name: Facility Management
categories.description: Workspace management, access control systems, environmental monitoring, and space planning.

categories.name: Asset Tracking
categories.description: Asset inventory, location tracking, depreciation management, and audit reconciliation.
